title: Driving test and theory test data: cars
body: "Car theory test data for Great Britain  Data updated quarterly  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT111A  Car theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain  (ODS, 12.7 KB)   DRT111B  Car theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter, financial year and gender: Great Britain   (ODS, 58.1 KB)     Data updated annually  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT111C  Car theory tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial year, gender and age: Great Britain  (ODS, 138 KB)     Car theory test data by test centre  This data table is updated annually. It was last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT112A  Car theory test pass rates by gender and month: test centres  (ODS, 3.98 MB)     Car driving test data for Great Britain  Data updated monthly  This data table is updated on the second Wednesday of each month with data to the end of the previous month. It was last updated on 10 December 2025 with data for November 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT121G  Car driving tests conducted, passed, pass rates and forward bookings, January 2019 to date: Great Britain  (ODS, 14.1 KB)     Data updated quarterly  These data tables are updated quarterly. They were last updated on 4 December 2025 with data to September 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT121A  Car driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial quarter and financial year: Great Britain   (ODS, 12.5 KB)   DRT121B  Car driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by month, financial quarter, financial year and gender: Great Britain   (ODS, 57.5 KB)     Data updated annually  These data tables are updated annually. They were last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT121C  Car driving tests conducted, passed and pass rates by financial year, gender and age: Great Britain  (ODS, 139 KB)   DRT121D  Car driving test number of attempts by financial year, gender, age, conducted, passed and pass rates: Great Britain   (ODS, 403 KB)   DRT121E  Car driving tests with zero faults: Great Britain  (ODS, 5.7 KB)   DRT121F  Car driving tests, top 10 faults made: Great Britain  (ODS, 6.3 KB)     Car driving test data by test centre  These data tables are updated annually. They were last updated on 14 August 2025 with data to March 2025.     Table reference File name     DRT122A  Car driving test pass rates by gender and month: test centres  (ODS, 8.13 MB)   DRT122B  Car driving test cancellation reasons: test centres  (ODS, 1.47 MB)   DRT122C  Car driving test pass rates by first driving attempt and gender, including zero faults: test centres  (ODS, 871 KB)   DRT122D  Car driving test pass rates by age (17 to 25 year olds) and year: test centres  (ODS, 5.51 MB)   DRT122E  Automatic car driving test pass rates by gender:...
